label: 2022 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
race_name: Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres

extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL won the sprint after POGAČAR attacked with 24km to go on the Koppenberg, they stayed away together, but POGAČAR refused turns in the finale and got boxed.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked decisively at 54km on Taaienberg then again on Koppenberg with 24km, but lack of sprint forced cooperation refusal.
VAN DER POEL recovered from early positioning errors by bridging after Koppenberg through superior power on cobbled sectors.
MADOUAS worked to bridge the POGAČAR/VAN DER POEL group, enabling VAN BAARLE's tactical sprint positioning from chase.
VAN HOOYDONCK initiated early aggressive riding for Quick-Step before climbs, setting nervous tempo that caused crashes behind.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: recovered from being out of position pre-Paterberg, bridged solo to POGAČAR group, won sprint after tactical finale
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: dominated with solo power on climbs but refused cooperation in finale when lacking sprint, boxed to fourth on debut
rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: positive: read tactical stalemate perfectly between POGAČAR/VAN DER POEL, timed bridge and sprint positioning for second place
rider_signals.MADOUAS Valentin: positive: bridged from chase group to leaders after Koppenberg, secured podium from disadvantaged position
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: initiated critical selection at 54km on Taaienberg that set up final group composition
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: positive: stayed in lead selection over Paterberg and Koppenberg, finished seventh from small elite group
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: rounded out top five after making final selection, strong classics showing from time trial specialist
rider_signals.VAN HOOYDONCK Nathan: positive: executed early aggressive Quick-Step tactics before main climbs despite WVA absence
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: negative: elevated to team leader role without WVA but crashed before decisive climbs started
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: negative: crashed during critical selection phase before climbs, finished ninth after recovery
rider_signals.GENIETS Kevin: negative: involved in crash during group mergers before key selections began
